{{Infobox character
| name = Steel Avalanche
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Combat Art]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Advocates’ Low Council, Advocate High Councilor, [[Advocate]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Advocates]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|fighter, guard}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]]
}}

''See also: [[Steel Avalanche Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Steel Avalanche is a gray-bearded human and a member of the [[Advocate]] [[High Council]]. A formidable combatant, he possesses the ability to utilize high-level [[Combat Arts]] with extreme brutality, allowing him to direct the immense power of his [[Aethertech]] gauntlets without causing self-destruction or collateral damage. These specialized [[steel]] gauntlets cover his forearms and feature glowing blue interiors. In combat, he has demonstrated the ability to manipulate water drawn from the [[Aether]], even splitting through whirlpools. Although he has survived near-death experiences, such as being trapped in a water vortex, his history is marked by violence; he previously served the role of hunter against certain groups and has been described as an abusive criminal. He is a significant figure within the [[Advocate]] organization, though his status as a fighter has been a point of contention among council members.}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|A broad, gray-bearded human and an enemy of the narrator, Steel Avalanche serves as a member of the Advocates’ Low [[Council]]. Clad in a blue-and-white uniform, he utilizes [[Aethertech]] gauntlets that cover his forearms and emit a sapphire light. As a skilled fighter, he employs a [[Combat Art]] to direct the force of his punches, which are powerful enough to strike opponents into ceilings. This individual is known for having killed the [[Nebula Runners]] and once expressed approval of [[Starhammer]]'s speech. Despite his role as a guard, he finds watching prisoners distasteful and would have killed the narrator if presented with the opportunity.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">14</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Steel Avalanche]] is a new member of the Advocates’ Low [[Council]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11">''The Engineer'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Steel Avalanche]] wears a blue-and-white uniform with the [[Advocate]] ‘A’ and silver [[Aethertech]] gauntlets.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Steel Avalanche]] is a fighter who can punch people into ceilings.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Steel Avalanche]] is a real fighter.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Steel Avalanche]] is a broad, gray-bearded human and an enemy of the narrator.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c23">''The Engineer'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Steel Avalanche]] wears [[Aethertech]] gauntlets that cover him from the forearms down.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Steel Avalanche]] is a gray-bearded human and an [[Advocate]] [[High Councilor]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c28">''The Engineer'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Steel Avalanche]] is a gray-bearded man who once killed the [[Nebula Runners]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Steel Avalanche]] uses an [[Aethertech weapon]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Steel Avalanche]] is an [[Advocate]] who expressed approval of [[Starhammer]]'s speech.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c42">''The Engineer'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Steel Avalanche]] would have killed the narrator if given the chance.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c49">''The Engineer'', chapter 49</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Steel Avalanche]] is a guard who dislikes watching prisoners.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51">''The Engineer'', chapter 51</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Steel Avalanche]] uses gauntlets that emit sapphire light.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Steel Avalanche]] has a [[Combat Art]] that allows him to direct the force of his punches.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Steel Avalanche]] was killed in a conflict with the [[Zenith Device]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Advocates]]
[[Category:Soldiers]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
